title: polygala amara var. parviflora
intro: Polygala amara var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered bitter milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Polygala amara var. parviflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and reduce the severity of respiratory infections.
